title: murtughas floribunda
side_effects: Murtughas floribunda can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Consuming the plant's leaves or flowers can also lead to gastrointestinal issues, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to the presence of toxic compounds. Furthermore, prolonged exposure to the plant's oils may cause skin irritation, redness, and inflammation. In extreme cases, improper use of Murtughas floribunda can even trigger cardiovascular problems, including rapid heartbeat and changes in blood pressure.
